Get involved

Flagship event

Space Impact Forum

Three focused days of ideas, connections and practical action for the future of space in Leicester.

What to expect

Keynotes, sector panels, investor tables and structured networking bring academia, industry, government and investors into the same conversation.

Flagship event

The Space Impact Forum

Three days of keynotes, panels and working sessions: the professional core of the Week.

Investment, innovation and sustainability—in one room.

Bringing together academia, industry, government and investors to focus on what Leicester’s space economy needs next: from Earth observation applications to talent pipelines.

KeynotesSector panelsInvestor tablesNetworking
Explore the Forum
LEICESTER SPACE WEEKExploring innovation together

A citywide platform for space innovation, sustainability, skills and public engagement—built with Leicester’s research, industry and civic partners.
